defects.description: Both integration tests (cli-version.test.ts, cli-help.test.ts) fail on `bun run test` because they call spawnSync('bun', ...) without resolving bun's full path. When bun is not on the subprocess PATH, spawnSync returns status: null. bun run test exits 1. Dev's go-signal claimed 2 passing; this was environment-dependent. Fix: resolve bun path in spawnSync call (process.execPath, Bun.argv[0], or explicit PATH env injection).

warnings.description: Missing test scaffold files from spec §1: tests/repl/useSubmit.test.ts, tests/ui/Prompt.test.tsx, tests/ui/Output.test.tsx, tests/ui/ErrorBoundary.test.tsx. Dev consolidated REPL tests into session.test.tsx and deferred UI tests. Sage must decide whether to enforce spec §1 file layout or accept consolidation before Pass 2.

bin field in package.json points to ./dist/teo which is never produced. Actual builds output dist/teo-darwin-arm64 and dist/teo-linux-x64. M1 tarball distribution is unaffected. Matches spec template exactly (spec has same discrepancy). Will break npm/bun global install if that path is ever taken.

notes.description: src/cli/** excluded from vitest coverage thresholds. Spec only named src/index.tsx and src/ui/**. Reasonable exclusion but not explicitly authorized. Staff-eng to confirm in Pass 2.
tests/pipelines/ directory absent. No pipeline test scaffold files created. Pass 2 will need to create tests/pipelines/MechanicalStub.test.tsx and ArchitecturalStub.test.tsx for Category E tests.
Two extra src files not in spec §1: src/repl/types.ts, src/audit/types.ts. Both are sensible type definition splits. No objection.

ci_coverage_gate_status: Pass 1 scaffold → CI passes lint/typecheck/test/build/smoke but fails coverage gate (stubs have 0% coverage). Pass 2 turns coverage green. This is designed behavior confirmed.

verification_results.test: FAIL — exit 1, 2 integration tests fail (DEFECT-1), 48 skipped
